spec_match.rationale: The AI demo now appends token spans through repeated <template for> chunks that include a fresh marker.

interactive.rationale: Controls reload the token stream and inspect chunks, but native Chrome parser patching still needs chrome-devtools-mcp verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now describes repeated marker patching rather than fetch reader token concatenation.

edge_cases.rationale: The stream demonstrates multiple appends to one range and a configurable delayed token.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus and the WICG patching explainer.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared live-patching styles and repo design variables.

openQuestions.title: Verify native marker append behavior in Chrome 150
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to confirm the iframe produces token spans from repeated marker patches and leaves no unapplied <template for> elements.

summary: Converted the AI page to a server-streamed repeated-marker patch demo.
